/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/transight.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o transight   -L/Users/khulanulziibat/.conan2/p/fmt175d118d68f15/p/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/khulanulziibat/.conan2/p/fmt175d118d68f15/p/lib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd /Users/khulanulziibat/.conan2/p/fmt175d118d68f15/p/lib/libfmt.a
